content_blocks.extracted_data: for the given information the most apporpriate Model is Autocratic Model & serandary. In autocratic Model there are the most of the decisions are taken by higher authority and under strong survalaince.

content_blocks.description: Handwritten answer about advantages and disadvantages.
content_blocks.extracted_data: Advantages: Here everyone is working is proper discipline manner and in proper given accordingly to time table. Disadvantage: There are less chance to communicate with each other erthout proper emotional support. Every one will do their own work only.
These two models best suitable to given sicenrio: i) Supportive model -> Everyone have proper support on wak ii) celiogial Model -> Their is no hierachy maintain between manager & Worker.

Organizational Behaviour: It is a physiological subject where the study of personal behaviour, emotions, social & physical mentality into organization at Macro level or at the group at meso level or itself it in micro individual level which level about what are the positive and negative of a person.

content_blocks.extracted_data: These are the scope of Organizational Behaviour. i) Micro-level (individuals): Here the personal behaviours are done at the individual level. ii) Meso-level (Groups): There are the group where the perform the given task and accordingly it will be. iii) Macro-level (organization): Between the large firm at a single place
